languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}Лишним не будет{/d}". {n}Бранек сутулится с хмурым видом.{/n} "Силы на исходе. Не хотелось бы, чтобы мои бойцы еще раз оплошали в испытании, дарованном им Богом-Императором".
languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Зарков
Не играет DL_MerovianKilled и играет DL_TraitorZarkov
DL_Treason_counter +1

traits.locale_text: "Лишним не будет". {n}Бранек сутулится с хмурым видом.{/n} "Силы на исходе. Не хотелось бы, чтобы мои бойцы еще раз оплошали в испытании, дарованном им Богом-Императором".
traits.speaker: BranekZarkov

languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Зарков
Не играет DL_MerovianKilled и играет DL_TraitorZarkov
DL_Treason_counter +1

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}It can't hurt{/d}." {n}Zarkov hunches his shoulders, scowling.{/n} "Our strength is running low. The God-Emperor has given my soldiers a test — I don't want them to fail it again."
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}Лишним не будет{/d}". {n}Бранек сутулится с хмурым видом.{/n} "Силы на исходе. Не хотелось бы, чтобы мои бойцы еще раз оплошали в испытании, дарованном им Богом-Императором".

traits.locale_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}It can't hurt{/d}." {n}Zarkov hunches his shoulders, scowling.{/n} "Our strength is running low. The God-Emperor has given my soldiers a test — I don't want them to fail it again."
"It can't hurt." {n}Zarkov hunches his shoulders, scowling.{/n} "Our strength is running low. The God-Emperor has given my soldiers a test — I don't want them to fail it again."
"It can't hurt." {n}Zarkov hunches his shoulders, scowling.{/n} "Our strength is running low. The God-Emperor has given my soldiers a test — I don't want them to fail it again."

languages.text: “{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}试试也无妨{/d}。”{n}扎尔科夫耸了耸肩，眉头紧锁。{/n}“我们的兵力已所剩不多。神皇给我的士兵们设下了考验——我不希望他们再次失败。”
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}It can't hurt{/d}." {n}Zarkov hunches his shoulders, scowling.{/n} "Our strength is running low. The God-Emperor has given my soldiers a test — I don't want them to fail it again."

traits.locale_text: “{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}试试也无妨{/d}。”{n}扎尔科夫耸了耸肩，眉头紧锁。{/n}“我们的兵力已所剩不多。神皇给我的士兵们设下了考验——我不希望他们再次失败。”

languages.text: « {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}Ça ne peut pas faire de mal{/d}. » {n}Zarkov rentre la tête dans les épaules, l'air renfrogné.{/n} « Nos forces s'amenuisent. L'Empereur-Dieu envoie une épreuve à mes soldats, et je refuse qu'ils échouent à nouveau. »
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}It can't hurt{/d}." {n}Zarkov hunches his shoulders, scowling.{/n} "Our strength is running low. The God-Emperor has given my soldiers a test — I don't want them to fail it again."

traits.locale_text: « {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}Ça ne peut pas faire de mal{/d}. » {n}Zarkov rentre la tête dans les épaules, l'air renfrogné.{/n} « Nos forces s'amenuisent. L'Empereur-Dieu envoie une épreuve à mes soldats, et je refuse qu'ils échouent à nouveau. »

languages.text: «{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}No sería mala idea{/d}». {n}Zarkov se encorva y frunce el ceño.{/n} «Nuestras fuerzas escasean. El Dios Emperador ha puesto a prueba a mis soldados... y no quiero que volvamos a fallarle».
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}It can't hurt{/d}." {n}Zarkov hunches his shoulders, scowling.{/n} "Our strength is running low. The God-Emperor has given my soldiers a test — I don't want them to fail it again."

traits.locale_text: «{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}No sería mala idea{/d}». {n}Zarkov se encorva y frunce el ceño.{/n} «Nuestras fuerzas escasean. El Dios Emperador ha puesto a prueba a mis soldados... y no quiero que volvamos a fallarle».

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}Zararı olmayacaktır{/d}." {n}Zarkov, omuzlarını kamburlaştırıp kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "Gücümüz tükeniyor. Tanrı İmparator askerlerimi sınıyor. Bu sınavda yine başarısız olmalarını istemiyorum."
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}It can't hurt{/d}." {n}Zarkov hunches his shoulders, scowling.{/n} "Our strength is running low. The God-Emperor has given my soldiers a test — I don't want them to fail it again."

traits.locale_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}Zararı olmayacaktır{/d}." {n}Zarkov, omuzlarını kamburlaştırıp kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "Gücümüz tükeniyor. Tanrı İmparator askerlerimi sınıyor. Bu sınavda yine başarısız olmalarını istemiyorum."

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}Das kann nicht schaden{/d}." {n}Zarkov zieht mürrisch die Schultern hoch.{/n} "Unsere Stärke schwindet. Der Gottimperator hat meinen Soldaten eine Prüfung auferlegt ... ich will nicht, dass sie erneut versagen."
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}It can't hurt{/d}." {n}Zarkov hunches his shoulders, scowling.{/n} "Our strength is running low. The God-Emperor has given my soldiers a test — I don't want them to fail it again."

traits.locale_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}Das kann nicht schaden{/d}." {n}Zarkov zieht mürrisch die Schultern hoch.{/n} "Unsere Stärke schwindet. Der Gottimperator hat meinen Soldaten eine Prüfung auferlegt ... ich will nicht, dass sie erneut versagen."

languages.text: 「{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}傷つけられないだろう。{/d}」{n}ザルコフは肩をすくめ、眉をひそめた。{/n}「我々の力は尽きつつある。神皇帝は私の兵士たちに試練を与えた。再び失敗させたくない。」
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}It can't hurt{/d}." {n}Zarkov hunches his shoulders, scowling.{/n} "Our strength is running low. The God-Emperor has given my soldiers a test — I don't want them to fail it again."

traits.locale_text: 「{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}傷つけられないだろう。{/d}」{n}ザルコフは肩をすくめ、眉をひそめた。{/n}「我々の力は尽きつつある。神皇帝は私の兵士たちに試練を与えた。再び失敗させたくない。」
